• users

• notifications
• conversations
• messages

Azure Cache for Redis
SKU: Basic C0 (250MB)
Cache Strategy:
• Property Listings
• User Sessions
• Search Results
• Frequently Accessed Data
TTL: 5-15 minutes
Eviction: LRU
Cost: ~$16/month

Mode: Serverless

• Chat Messaging
• Status Updates
• Live Updates
Limits: 20 concurrent
20K messages/day
Cost: $0/month

div.div:
Azure Blob Storage
SKU: Standard LRS
Lifecycle Management:
• Hot: Property Images (0-30d)
• Cool: Older Docs (30-90d)
• Archive: Historical (>90d)
Features:
• Image Optimization
• CDN Integration
• Versioning Enabled
Cost: ~$5/month

💰 Total Monthly Cost
Low Traffic (<1K users):
$34 - $69/month
Medium Traffic (1K users):
$210 - $240/month
High Traffic (10K+ users):
$1,600/month
Free Tier Benefits:
• 1M Function Executions
• 1M APIM Calls
• SignalR Free Tier
• Cloudflare Free Plan
